title: Digital Business Transformation Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: Experience in process optimisation, project management and/or change management
Passion for achieving strategic goals and monitoring using KPIs
Strong communication skills for process change facilitation
bonus_skills: ERP system knowledge (SAP or Infor LN)
matched_skills: Process optimisation: ECE Group spreadsheet automation and process efficiency improvements; IPC Marketing SOPs and GTM process standardisation
KPI monitoring and strategic goal tracking: HSBC burn-rate dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting, VfB Stuttgart KPI framework design
Cross-functional stakeholder communication: HSBC 6-workstream coordination, Hapag-Lloyd sprint coordination
Go-to-market strategy: IPC Marketing 4-product launches, GRG 6-product line GTM
International team collaboration: multi-market EMEA/APAC experience
core_responsibilities: Shape digital future of processes across all business areas (sales, engineering, order management, production, logistics)
Define strategy and goals with stakeholders resulting in a roadmap
Lead identification of valuable digital use cases
Analyse AS-IS processes, identify improvements using value stream mapping
Draft new business processes including actors and organisational changes
Define budget and resource needs for roadmap/milestone implementation
Track success using KPIs and reports
recommended_emphasis: HSBC digital transformation programme: USD 8M budget governance across 6 workstreams — directly demonstrates transformation management capability
KPI framework and monitoring: VfB Stuttgart sustainability KPI framework, HSBC dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd performance reporting
ECE Group process optimisation and automation as analog for AS-IS/TO-BE process improvement
IPC Marketing SOPs and GTM process standardisation as process design experience
Multi-language skills as bonus (English C1, German B1, Chinese C2, Cantonese C2)
summary: Score 55.6 (moderate match). Boru's HSBC digital transformation programme governance is the strongest alignment point — directly relevant to leading digital business transformation. KPI tracking, process optimisation, and cross-functional coordination are well evidenced. Gaps are ERP/Salesforce system knowledge and formal change management credentials. Recommend applying, emphasising the HSBC transformation programme and KPI-driven governance approach.
